self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:

    def __getattr__(self, name):

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def test_list__filter_by_type__returns_correct_response(
        self,
        client: "APIClient",
        error_list_url: "AliasErrorListUrl",
        error_batch: "QuerySet[Error]",
    ) -> None:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

    def __getattr__(self, name):

    def __getattr__(self, name):

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

    def __getattr__(self, name):

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):

            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""

            self._setup(name)

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:
>           raise ImproperlyConfigured("The SECRET_KEY setting must not be empty.")

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.

self = <LazySettings "config">, name = 'SECRET_KEY'

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # Special case some settings which require further modification.
        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
        if name in {"MEDIA_URL", "STATIC_URL"} and val is not None:
            val = self._add_script_prefix(val)
        elif name == "SECRET_KEY" and not val:

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        """Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__."""
        if (_wrapped := self._wrapped) is empty:
            self._setup(name)
            _wrapped = self._wrapped
        val = getattr(_wrapped, name)

        # This is done here for performance reasons so the modified value is cached.
